initial_location_description: A vibrant, bustling cityscape of early 20th century Tokyo at night. Towering Western-style brick buildings are illuminated by glowing electric streetlamps and colorful neon signs. Crowds of people in both traditional kimonos and modern suits fill the wide stone-paved streets. Steam rises from street-side food stalls.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The night air of Asakusa isn't filled with the scent of pine or snow, but with the heavy, electric hum of modern progress.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [stuttering] Is it always... this bright at night?! The buildings are so tall, they're scraping the stars!
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Comically shocked, white circular eyes, jaw dropped

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro clings to Nezuko's hand, feeling like a small fish tossed into a roaring ocean of people and artificial light.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko, don't let go! This city is... it's dizzying. How can people live with all this noise?
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Tilted head, curious expression, one hand touching the bamboo muzzle

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: They retreat to a small, quiet udon stall at the edge of the district, seeking a moment of respite from the crowd.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [exhaling] Let's just eat something and rest for a bit. Excuse me, sir! A bowl of Yamakake Udon, please.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted but trying to be polite

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The vendor hands him a steaming bowl. But as the vapor rises, it brings a scent that freezes the blood in Tanjiro's veins.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: ...! [gasp] This scent... I know this smell. It's the one from my house!
main_dialogue.tone: Sudden, sharp realization bordering on terror
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The ceramic bowl slips from his hands, shattering on the ground. The udon is forgotten as his instincts take over.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko, stay here! I have to find him!
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro shoves past pedestrians, his eyes darting frantically as the scent grows thicker, more suffocating.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [panting] Out of my way! He's here... he's right here!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Focus your senses to pinpoint him

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro closes his eyes for a split second, filtering out the smell of oil, perfume, and smoke to find that one rot-filled trail.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: There. Between the streetlamp and the carriage... I won't let you get away!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The center of the district, packed with people. In the middle of the crowd, a man in a black fedora and white suit stands with his back to the camera, radiating an aura of absolute coldness.
